title: [DO NOT MERGE] chroot + testing + coverage
body: This is an attempt to fix some places where tests are failing in https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/4829, particularly errors like https://cirrus-ci.com/task/6056891437023232?logs=unit_test#L8.
